title: ilex kelsallii
intro: Ilex kelsallii, also known as Kelsall's holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to the subtropical regions of eastern Australia. The leaves of the Ilex kelsallii plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex kelsallii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Ilex kelsallii is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
